commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/mpijob-uccl-upstream.yaml /tmp/mpijob-uccl-upstream.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete mpijob uccl-ep-upstream -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete mpijob uccl-ep-correctness -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete cm uccl-ep-upstream-script -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation 2>&1'
